organizations.name: Fintel Connect
organizations.shortBlurb: Fintel Connect is a startup located in the Lower Mainland of BC, with funding of $5.3M. Key people include founder and CEO Nicky Senyard. The company has a size of 1-50 employees and can be found online at their website and LinkedIn page.

organizations.name: Unblocked
organizations.keyPeople: Dennis Pilarinos - Founder & CEO (previously at Microsoft, Amazon, Apple)
organizations.shortBlurb: Unblocked is a startup located in the Lower Mainland BC region, founded by Dennis Pilarinos, who has a background at Microsoft, Amazon, and Apple. The company has received $20M in funding and has a small team of 1-50 employees. More information can be found on their website and LinkedIn page.

organizations.name: SFU's Digital Democracies Institute
organizations.shortBlurb: The Digital Democracies Institute focuses on AI ethics and NLP/LLMs, operates as a non-profit in Burnaby, and is directed by Dr. Wendy Chun. It is pending opt-in status and has a presence on LinkedIn and its own website.

organizations.name: Epsilon Venture Group
organizations.shortBlurb: Epsilon Venture Group is a startup based in Vancouver focusing on AI strategy consulting, particularly in data science and other AI applications. They have notable projects with 2-9 employees and engage in projects worth over $5,000. The company is currently in the research phase.

organizations.name: Insight Global
organizations.shortBlurb: Insight Global focuses on AI in data science and other applications, based in Vancouver's Lower Mainland. The company offers enterprise-level business intelligence and data analytics services, employing between 1,000 and 9,999 individuals, and is currently in the research phase.

organizations.shortBlurb: WillowTree focuses on AI in data science and GenAI, located in Vancouver's Lower Mainland, serving major clients with project minimums over $250,000. The company is currently in the research phase and has a significant employee base of 1,000-9,999.

organizations.name: Telus Ventures

Key contact links include LinkedIn, TELUS Digital, and TELUS International AI.

organizations.name: Wayve
